reviews.review_title: I cant wait for this game to be popular
reviews.review_description: Its actual better than other copys cuz i know 2 actual good ones that are going to get deleted but the halooween (i forgot how to spell it 😎👍) just off the reviews i knew when i joind it will be good 😎👍( my lil bro forced me to use this pfp😭😭😭😭)

Hello, my name is Heaven (you can call me Breaker), I’m one of the owners friends but importantly I’m not a moderator. From my experience, this game is based more on competitive than just normal tag. They have long arms and valve physics (30 - 40% of it) if you are the type of person to try something more competitive than just using mods make the game unfair in every app lab games or games that do not work such as pubs, non-toxic community (ofc there will be some), I would recommend playing this game. 

For the owner: If it’s ok, can I have a name tag above me as a cosmetic for example: (known from owner). I don’t want the early access since most people won’t understand. Ty
